meta.title: Multi modal Audio + Text Fine tuning and Inference with Qwen
meta.description:
➡️ Qwen Audio Colab Notebook: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/18Owz_xvmZ3oO3PbR8o94KcsGBBdEEtcj?usp=sharing
➡️ Get Life-time Access to the Complete Scripts (and future improvements): https://Trelis.com/ADVANCED-transcription/
➡️ One-click fine-tuning and LLM templates: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/one-click-llms
➡️ Trelis Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Resources/Support/Discord: https://Trelis.com/About
➡️ Thumbnail made with this tutorial: https://youtu.be/ThKYjTdkyP8

VIDEO RESOURCES:
Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1djNIaMCcDRBuMj-GPX5TClMn03gZjMpsArixedR_MCo/edit?usp=sharing
- Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Trelis/bird-songs
- Qwen Audio paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.10759

TIMESTAMPS:
00:00 - Introduction to multimodal audio plus text models
00:40 - Overview of Qwen 2 Audio model capabilities and applications
01:20 - Technical details of the Qwen 2 Audio model architecture
02:52 - Benefits of integrated multimodal model vs separate models
03:59 - Applications and use cases
06:05 - Key advantages of the integrated model
07:17 - Specific applications:
- Customer support voice assistants
- Transcription with emotion detection
- Sound/acoustic analysis
- Audio + text assisted transcription
- Zero-shot transcription
08:16 - Introduction to LoRA fine-tuning approach
09:22 - Google Colab implementation walkthrough
10:31 - Model loading and configuration
12:42 - Testing audio processing capabilities
15:24 - Audio input examples and testing
17:21 - Dataset preparation for fine-tuning
19:01 - Detailed data collation process
24:44 - Processing audio and text inputs
29:28 - Setting up the data collator
35:31 - Training configuration and LoRA setup
42:42 - Training process and hyperparameters
47:50 - VLLM inference setup
51:58 - Production deployment considerations
54:24 - Fine-tuning results and analysis
55:44 - Conclusion and summary
